requirements.description: packages/keel-invariants/src/invariants.manifest.ts exports const invariants: Invariant[] with { id, description, sourcePath, contentHash, anchors } shape per entry.
requirements.notes: Shape contract enforced at compile time by TypeScript (tsc -b 16/16 green) and at import time by Zod (InvariantsSchema.parse(raw) runs synchronously). No automated test file — see § Testing Standards. Deferred to Story 1.9's sync-gate which exercises the manifest end-to-end on every pre-merge invocation.

requirements.description: Each entry: id matches INV-<category>-<slug>, sourcePath resolves to an existing repo file, contentHash is sha256 of the sourcePath region (whole-file per Story 1.8 scope carve-out).
requirements.notes: ID pattern + contentHash-format (64-hex) enforced by Zod regex at import time. sourcePath existence verified manually at dev-story (Task 1) across all 9 entries; programmatic reachability check deferred to Story 1.9's anchor walker. sha256 values pre-computed and frozen in source per § Scope Carve-Out (whole-file bounding for Story 1.8; sub-region hashing at Story 1.9).

requirements.description: New rule added to keel-invariants MUST register a manifest entry with a fresh stable ID; Story 1.9 treats unregistered rules as drift.
requirements.notes: Story 1.8 ships the contract side — canonical pin of 9 existing IDs + Zod shape + hashes. The 'unregistered → drift' enforcement is explicitly scoped to Story 1.9's FR43 sync-gate per AC inline carve-out and § Scope Carve-Out. No Epic 1-stage automated coverage planned at Story 1.8.

requirements.description: Manifest loads synchronously (no async I/O) and validates against its Zod schema at import time.
requirements.notes: End-to-end exercised by Task 3 runtime smoke check: `node --input-type=module -e "import('@keel/keel-invariants')…"` printed `OK: 9 invariants` (evidence: story file line 160, Dev Agent Record Task 3). Zod InvariantsSchema.parse(raw) runs synchronously at module import; a bad entry throws ZodError with structured path — verified by the schema definition + the parse invocation at src/invariants.manifest.ts. No dedicated unit test file per § Testing Standards: the Zod schema IS the test. Story 1.9's sync-gate will re-exercise this AC on every pre-merge.

recommendations.action: Defer AC-1 / AC-2 / AC-3 runtime enforcement to Story 1.9 FR43 sync-gate (anchor-walk, sourcePath reachability, ID uniqueness, drift detection)
AC-4 substrate-verified via Task 3 runtime smoke check; no additional automated coverage required at Story 1.8. Story 1.9 will re-exercise on every pre-merge invocation

Defer dedicated Zod-edge-case unit tests (bad-id / empty-anchors / bad-hash) to Story 1.16 test-runner landing + Story 1.9 integration coverage. Duplicating Zod's upstream ~1000+ internal tests is not value-adding
